title: Geanthus pubimarginatus
intro:

However, I can provide information on the plant Geanthus, which is more commonly known as Gentian. 

Gentian (Gentiana lutea) is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, known for its bright yellow flowers and long, pointed leaves. 

The health benefits of Gentian include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating due to its anti-inflammatory properties. 

The bioactive constituents of Gentian include iridoid glycosides, gentiopicroside, and amarogentin, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Gentian include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat digestive issues and stimulate appetite.
